question: You'd rather your partner surprise you with...
optionA: A heartfelt letter only you will ever read

question: Arguments in your relationship usually start because of...
optionA: Small things piling up until one of us snaps
optionB: One big thing neither of us has said out loud yet

question: After a bad day, what you actually need from your partner is...
optionA: To be listened to without them trying to fix it
optionB: A distraction — watch something, go out, move on

question: When you miss your partner during the day, you...
optionA: Send them a message saying exactly what you're thinking
optionB: Just hold onto it and tell them later in person

question: Your idea of a perfect evening together is...
optionA: A long conversation over dinner that goes somewhere unexpected
optionB: Doing something — cooking, hiking, a project — side by side

question: What you value most in your relationship is...
optionA: Still laughing at the same things after all this time

question: When something is wrong between you two, you tend to...
optionA: Want to talk about it right away, even if it's hard
optionB: Need a little time before you can say what you feel
